system.description: Purple Jelly Fungus: Jelly Fungus is an edible mold. There is a subtype that grows in the Purple Caverns that is particularly healthy. This is a colorful gelatinous fruit-bearing mold that can be consumed as a meal. One handful of Jelly Fungus is about as nutritious as a bowl of rice and green leafy vegetables.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
system.effects: One handful provides nourishment comparable to a bowl of rice and green leafy vegetables.
